title: Appraisers and Assessors of Real Estate
description: Appraise real estate, exclusively, and estimate its fair value. May assess taxes in accordance with prescribed schedules.

tasks.text: Compute final estimation of property values, taking into account such factors as depreciation, replacement costs, value comparisons of similar properties, and income potential.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare written reports that estimate property values, outline methods by which the estimations were made, and meet appraisal standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Photograph interiors and exteriors of properties to assist in estimating property value, substantiate findings, and complete appraisal reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Search public records for transactions such as sales, leases, and assessments.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Obtain county land values and sales information about nearby properties to aid in establishment of property values.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain familiarity with aspects of local real estate markets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect properties, considering factors such as market value, location, and building or replacement costs to determine appraisal value.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Collect and analyze relevant data to identify real estate market trends.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review information about transfers of property to ensure its accuracy, checking basic information on buyers, sellers, and sales prices and making corrections as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze trends in sales prices, construction costs, and rents, to assess property values or determine the accuracy of assessments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect new construction and major improvements to existing structures to determine values.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Check building codes and zoning bylaws to determine any effects on the properties being appraised.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview persons familiar with properties and immediate surroundings, such as contractors, home owners, and realtors, to obtain pertinent information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify legal descriptions of properties by comparing them to county records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Evaluate land and neighborhoods where properties are situated, considering locations and trends or impending changes that could influence future values.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine the type and location of nearby services, such as shopping centers, schools, parks, and other neighborhood features, to evaluate their impact on property values.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Examine income records and operating costs of income properties.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Estimate building replacement costs, using building valuation manuals and professional cost estimators.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draw land diagrams to be used in appraisal reports to support findings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct regular reviews of property within jurisdictions to determine changes in property due to construction or demolition.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Testify in court as to the value of a piece of real estate property.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify the ownership of each piece of taxable property.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and maintain current data on each parcel assessed, including maps of boundaries, inventories of land and structures, property characteristics, and any applicable exemptions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Establish uniform and equitable systems for assessing all classes and kinds of property.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calculate tax bills for properties by multiplying assessed values by jurisdiction tax rates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Determine taxability of properties, using methods such as field inspection, structural measurement, calculation, sales analysis, market trend studies, and income and expense analysis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Explain assessed values to property owners and defend appealed assessments at public hearings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Explain real and personal property taxes to property owners.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
